title: Switching users without having to log out and back in
excerpt:
monday.com currently allows users to easily switch between monday.com accounts by clicking ‘Switch accounts’ in the main avatar menu.

posts.author: samicaracand (Sami Caracand (DocuGen))
posts.cookedHtml:
monday.com currently allows users to easily switch between monday.com accounts by clicking ‘Switch accounts’ in the main avatar menu.

However, there seems to be no way to switch between users on the same account without having to log out and back in. For example, there are accounts where I have more than one user. For example, accounts where I have been invited as a guest more than once using different email addresses, or demo accounts where I need to present the user experience using multiple users associated with my email addresses.

Is this on the roadmap?

posts.author: rbridges (Robin Bridges)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love this option as well. I have my own account, but for the foreseeable future, I will also be monitoring a former coworker’s account while we hire and train her replacement. It would be so useful to be able to be logged in as both users at the same time.
